# Contributing

Contributions are [released](https://help.github.com/articles/github-terms-of-service/#6-contributions-under-repository-license) to the public under the [open source license of this project](../LICENSE).

## Submitting a pull request

1. [Fork](https://github.com/dimpen/cloudflare-ddns-next/fork) and clone the repository.
2. Create a new branch `git checkout -b my-new-feature`
3. Modify the code.
4. Make sure to add comments to explain your code.
5. Make sure your code is running without any errors.
6. Commit your modifications.
7. Push to your fork and [submit a pull request](https://github.com/dimpen/cloudflare-ddns-next/compare)

## Resources

- [Using Pull Requests](https://help.github.com/articles/about-pull-requests/)
- [How to Contribute to Open Source](https://opensource.guide/how-to-contribute/)
